headline: Built for AppDirect
subheadline: AI-powered systems to scale cloud subscriptions and integrate acquisitions across global operations

challenges.title: Scaling Subscriptions
challenges.desc: AppDirect handles millions of cloud subscriptions but faces growth limits. Integration with third-party services adds complexity. Expanding marketplaces requires efficient scaling solutions.

challenges.title: Acquisition Integration
challenges.desc: Recent acquisitions like Tackle.io need seamless merging. This disrupts existing operations in 17 countries. Teams must align systems without downtime.

challenges.title: Global Coordination
challenges.desc: Managing a 698-person workforce across 17 countries creates communication gaps. Time zone differences slow decision-making. Standardizing processes is a constant challenge.

challenges.title: Team Alignment
challenges.desc: Coordinating cloud professional services teams is tough with rapid changes. Advisors and providers need better collaboration tools. Internal silos hinder subscription management.

deliverables.title: Subscription Scaler
deliverables.desc: Builds automated systems to handle millions of subscriptions and scale marketplaces, integrating with AppDirect's existing platform for seamless operations

deliverables.title: Acquisition Integrator
deliverables.desc: Develops frameworks to merge acquisitions like Tackle.io into core systems, ensuring data flow and reducing disruptions across global teams

deliverables.title: Global Ops Coordinator
deliverables.desc: Creates tools for managing a distributed workforce of 698 people, standardizing processes in 17 countries for better efficiency

deliverables.title: Team Sync System
deliverables.desc: Establishes AI-driven coordination for cloud services teams, linking advisors and providers to improve subscription handling and decision speed

engagementSteps.title: Assessment Phase
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 1
engagementSteps.desc: Review AppDirect's current infrastructure and identify key pain points like subscription scaling and acquisition integration.

engagementSteps.title: Design and Build
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 2
engagementSteps.desc: Develop tailored AI systems based on the assessment, focusing on global operations and team coordination.

engagementSteps.title: Implementation and Review
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 3
engagementSteps.desc: Deploy the new infrastructure, integrate it with existing platforms, and conduct reviews for ongoing improvements.

faqItems.question: What does this service offer?
faqItems.answer: It provides AI-powered sales infrastructure tailored for AppDirect's cloud subscription needs.

faqItems.question: How does it address scaling?
faqItems.answer: The system automates subscription management to handle millions of users efficiently.

faqItems.question: Is integration with acquisitions included?
faqItems.answer: Yes, it includes frameworks for merging systems like Tackle.io seamlessly.

faqItems.question: What is the timeline?
faqItems.answer: Engagement spans three months with clear steps for assessment, build, and implementation.

faqItems.question: How much does it cost?
faqItems.answer: Costs vary based on scope, but we base it on AppDirect's revenue and team size for fair pricing.

faqItems.question: What tools will we use?
faqItems.answer: We use tools from AppDirect's stack, including cloud platforms, to ensure compatibility.

stackItems.name: AWS
stackItems.role: Handles scalable cloud infrastructure for global operations

stackItems.name: Salesforce
stackItems.role: Supports CRM for team coordination and advisor management

stackItems.name: Stripe
stackItems.role: Processes billing for millions of subscriptions
